name: omc-ac
description: Dogfooding: deploy oh-my-claudecode's MCP server + 19 bridged hook scripts + 87 content surfaces (19 agents / 40 skills / 28 commands) across agent CLIs via @ken-jo/agent-connector, replacing OMC's installer / hooks.json / plugin manifests. OMC itself runs UNCHANGED from the upstream checkout (runtime dependency by path).
